channel.title: LOXTR - Global Trade Intelligence Blog
channel.description: AI-powered insights for international trade: customs compliance, buyer discovery, freight forecasting, and export strategies.

item.title: Why Turkey Is Your Next Target Market in 2026
item.description: Turkey's strategic position bridging Europe and Asia, combined with competitive manufacturing costs and free trade agreements, makes it an ideal sourcing destination for 2026.

item.title: Gateway to EMEA: Turkey's Strategic Trade Position
item.description: How Turkey's geographic advantage and trade agreements position it as the gateway to Europe, Middle East, and Africa for global traders.

item.title: Navigating Turkish Customs: A Complete Guide
item.description: Step-by-step guide to Turkish customs procedures, documentation requirements, HS code classification, and tariff calculations for importers and exporters.

item.title: How to Verify Turkish Suppliers Before You Buy
item.description: Practical methods to verify Turkish suppliers: trade registry checks, factory audits, reference verification, and AI-powered due diligence tools.

item.title: Understanding Incoterms 2020: A Practical Guide
item.description: Clear explanations of all 11 Incoterms 2020 rules with practical examples for exporters and importers. When to use FOB, CIF, EXW, DDP, and more.
